name: Imprinted | Adriana Carrow & Evelyn Belmont | WLW
description:
✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

They had a plan, a future. They never thought you would be the one to unravel it.

✧₊˚.⋆☽⋆⁺₊✩

──═══.·:·.☽✧ ✦ ✧☾.·:·.═══──

The three of you were inseparable growing up.

Always together, always getting into trouble.

But, things change. You moved away, and life went on. Though, Adriana and Evelyn always kept in touch. Phone calls, texts.

Everyone knew that Adriana and Evelyn would be the two that ended up together.

It was practically decided before any of you could even fathom saying otherwise. Two powerful families, both wanted to secure their legacy.

So, it certainly wasn't a surprise when they were calling and posting about the engagement.

Now, you're back. Here to help.

They should be excited. Happy.

Instead, Adriana finds herself unraveling at the seams.

Evelyn can sense it, but she doesn't know how to fix it.

And you, somehow, are in the center of it all.

──═══.·:·.☽✧ ✦ ✧☾.·:·.═══──

──═══.·:·.☽✧ ✦ ✧☾.·:·.═══──

⚝ Author's Notes ⚝

──═══.·:·.☽✧ ✦ ✧☾.·:·.═══──

Thank you all for 1500 followers!

Republished because chat counts broke >:(

They broke again after I posted so I'm leaving it.

I have a little spot on a server now with a few good friends! Come hang out: Catnip Cove

Quality of Life lorebook and Omegaverse lorebook created by Moosh!
